DEPT 1/JUDGE MASON/REPORTER:M.NORMAN/CLERK:G.SHULL. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. ATNY JOSEPH SACRAMENTO PRESENT WITH PLTFS. ATNY BRENT KERNAN PRESENT WITH DEFTS. CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARROLL, NANCY CARROLL, BOB THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 23 EDINBURGH STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $100.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $100.00, STAYED UNTIL AUG-21-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, STAY OF EVICTION THROUGH 8-20-96 AT 11:59PM. PLTFS WAIVE BACK RENT & DAMAGES; AND IF DEFTS PAY ALL UTILITIES FOR PREMISES, PLTF WILL FILE SATISFACTION OF MONEY JUDGMNT. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COSTS & ATNYS FEES. NO FURTHER STAYS. PLTF RETAINS DEPOSITS/INTEREST. MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS.
